headline: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
summary: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve his planned 40,000-acre data center in Utah. This decision came amid pressure from residents and activists. He committed to removing 19,430 acres from the project.

headline: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
summary: Google now allows major creators and publishers to claim dedicated profiles in Search. These profiles highlight videos, articles, and other online presences. Access is limited to those with at least 100,000 followers on platforms like YouTube, Instagram, or X.

headline: Amazon’s new plan for games: James Bond and AI Snoop Dogg
summary: Amazon is outlining a clearer strategy for its gaming division. Plans include developing a new James Bond game. The company is also exploring projects featuring AI Snoop Dogg.

headline: Belkin’s new Joy-Con grips also boost the Switch 2’s battery life
summary: Belkin's new Charging Grip for the Switch 2 enhances playtime and protection. It adds three to four hours of battery life with a 10,000mAh battery pack. The accessory also improves the Switch controller's feel.

headline: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Noise Canceling Headphones Drop to New Price Low for Father's Day
summary: Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones are now at a record low price. This Father's Day deal makes them highly competitive. They offer unmatched noise cancellation in their price category.

headline: The Odyssey Rating and Custom IMAX Camera Popcorn Bucket Revealed
summary: Christopher Nolan's film, "The Odyssey," has received an R-rating. Viewers under 17 will require a parent or guardian to attend screenings. A custom IMAX Camera Popcorn Bucket has also been unveiled.

headline: Amazon's June Audible Deal Gets You 3 Months for Just $0.99 Per Month
summary: Amazon Audible is offering a special June deal. New subscribers can get three months for only $0.99 per month. Catch up on audiobooks from popular authors like Rebecca Yarros and Brandon Sanderson.

headline: The Remarkable Paper Pure Is The Best Way to Take Digital Notes
summary: The Remarkable Paper Pure is lauded as the top digital note-taking solution. It promises an unparalleled digital note-taking experience. Users are encouraged to embrace the convenience and never look back.

headline: Royal Navy crew killed in helicopter crash named
summary: Three Royal Navy crew members have been named following a helicopter crash. Tributes were paid to Lt Cdr Chris Gayson, 42, Lt Lily-Mae Fisher, 31, and Petty Officer Owen Green, 24. The incident marks a tragic loss for the service.

headline: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM
summary: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer met with the family of Henry Nowak. He stated Nowak's legacy should extend beyond the tragedy of his death. The meeting took place at 10 Downing Street.

headline: How misinformation about student's murder sent two people into hiding
summary: Misinformation regarding Henry Nowak's murder forced two people into hiding. A former police officer was wrongly identified at the scene of Nowak's arrest and death. She expressed fear for her safety due to the false accusations.

headline: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
summary: Donald Trump criticized a House vote concerning Iran, calling it 'unpatriotic'. The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure seeking to halt further military action. The vote was largely seen as a symbolic rebuke to Trump.
